title: justicia tenera
intro: Justicia tenera, also known as the 'False Jesuita', is a flowering plant species native to Central America and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Justicia tenera typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
